commit.message:
Fix: rename column 'estado' to 'estado_envio' in all nurturing_log queries

The nurturing_log table uses 'estado_envio' as column name but all SQL
references used 'estado'. Fixed in model, cron, controller, and view.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add create task dialog, auto-save, multi-file drop, and comments/data fixes

- Add CreateTaskDialog: when filters are active, Enter opens a dialog instead
  of inserting an inline block, supporting #hashtag and @mention parsing
- Add debounced auto-save (3s default) for inline note title edits
- Support multi-file drag & drop in BlockNoteEditor with parallel uploads,
  and inject delete buttons on file blocks
- Simplify comments UI: remove reply/resolve threading, flatten to a linear
  comment list with compact layout and toast on save
- Make comments fully optimistic: instant UI updates with pending-mutation
  guard to prevent realtime subscription from overwriting local state
- Fix foreign key violations: await note insert in Supabase before emitting
  label/assignee events in createNote and createNoteAfter
- Add optimistic assignee cache updates via event subscription
- Change default note sort from sort_order to created_at descending
- Fix GCal calendar fetch deduplication with one-shot ref
- Add is_default field to Contact type, fix Supabase type casts
- Remove note_comments updated_at DB trigger (managed in app code)
- Add i18n keys for create task dialog and comment saved toast (en/es/pt)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: correct api test mocks for jsdom environment and flexible header matching

Use jsdom's native window instead of stubbing globalThis, and match headers
with objectContaining to avoid brittleness from additional default headers.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Link personal website nav and wire up BTS wireframe image

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: mock Ollama availability in pipeline integration tests

Classifier routes low-complexity tasks to Ollama when available,
bypassing the Claude mock. Patch _ollama_available to False so all
5 stages flow through the mock consistently.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat: redesign Copilot sleeping mascot to match brand identity (#507)

## Summary
- Redesigned the GitHub Copilot sleeping mascot SVG to match the
official Copilot brand identity (helmet with goggles, ear bumps, face
plate with vents)
- Replaced the old dark generic robot look with Copilot's signature
blue-purple gradient, goggle eyes, and pink/magenta accents
- Kept sleeping aesthetic (half-closed goggle eyelids, dimmed vents, Zzz
animation)

## Changes
- **`SleepingMascots.tsx`**: Rewrote `CopilotSleeping` component with:
- Rounded helmet dome with blue-to-purple gradient and pink accent
overlay
- Goggle-style binocular eyes with frames, bridge, dark lenses, and
sleeping eyelid overlays
  - Ear bumps on both sides (blue left, pink/magenta right)
  - Lower face plate with 3 ventilation slits (dimmed for sleeping)
- Removed old dark body, legs/feet, teal eye sockets, green LEDs,
magenta stripe
- **`SleepingMascots.test.tsx`**: Updated tests:
- Selector test now checks for Copilot-specific goggle frame color
(`#5AB0E0`)
- Replaced magenta stripe test with: goggle frames, ear bumps, face
plate with 3 vent slits
  - Kept SVG dimensions and Zzz animation tests

## Test Plan
- [x] All 15 SleepingMascots tests pass
- [x] Typecheck passes
- [ ] Visual review: Copilot mascot renders with correct helmet shape
and brand colors
- [ ] Verify mascot appears correctly in both main panel and popout
views
- [ ] Compare with brand assets to confirm recognizability

## Manual Validation
1. Open Clubhouse with a Copilot CLI agent configured
2. Ensure the agent is in sleeping/idle state
3. Verify the mascot shows: blue-purple helmet dome, goggle eyes
(half-closed), ear bumps, face plate with vent slits, Zzz
4. Confirm pink/magenta accent is visible on the right side of the
helmet

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Add planning retry with fallback model for JSON parse failures

When the primary planning model returns unparseable JSON, automatically
retry with a different model (Sonnet if Opus/Haiku failed, Haiku if
Sonnet failed) before giving up. This addresses recurring coordinator
planning failures that were previously non-retriable.

commit.message:
feat: redesign Claude Code sleeping mascot to match Claude identity (#506)

## Summary
- Redesigned the Claude Code sleeping mascot SVG to match the iconic
Claude mascot shape (blocky body, ear bumps, arms, 4 legs)
- Removed the old nightcap/birthday-hat imagery from the Claude 1-year
anniversary
- Kept sleeping aesthetic (closed-eye arcs, subtle blush, Zzz animation)

## Changes
- **`SleepingMascots.tsx`**: Rewrote `ClaudeCodeSleeping` component
with:

  - 2 ear bumps at top corners
  - 2 stubby arms on the sides
  - 4 legs in 2 pairs (was 3 legs with feet)

  - Kept sleeping closed-eye arcs, subtle blush, and Zzz animation
- **`SleepingMascots.test.tsx`**: Added 3 new test cases:
  - Verifies 4 legs are present
  - Verifies 2 arms are present
  - Verifies nightcap elements are absent

## Test Plan
- [x] All 16 SleepingMascots tests pass (including 3 new)
- [x] Typecheck passes
- [ ] Visual review: sleeping Claude mascot renders with correct shape
and proportions
- [ ] Verify mascot appears correctly in both main panel and popout
views

## Manual Validation
1. Open Clubhouse with a Claude Code agent configured
2. Ensure the agent is in sleeping/idle state
3. Verify the mascot shows: blocky body, 2 ear bumps, 2 arms, 4 legs,
sleeping eyes, Zzz
4. Confirm no nightcap or birthday hat elements are visible

fix: drop match_thoughts before recreating to allow return type changes

PostgreSQL cannot ALTER the return type of an existing function via
CREATE OR REPLACE. Adding DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS before the CREATE
so init.sql is safe to re-run when the function signature changes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: admin graphs, session persistence, reservation panel UX, multi-date admin

- Fix disappearing admin charts (cancellations by hour/day) — defer
  Chart.js render until after all Promise.all loads settle with retry loop
- Add token refresh endpoint (POST /api/auth/refresh) and auto-refresh
  logic in browse.html + restaurant.html — sessions stay alive via
  proactive 50-min refresh cycle + 401 retry wrapper
- Add Tonino restaurant image (static/restaurants/73777.jpg)
- Redesign reservation panel: slides from left, wider (540px), bigger
  fonts throughout, show grouped dates + time preferences, unified
  "Monitoring" terminology, friendlier "Refreshing connection" message
- Add multi-date select to admin snipe launcher — date chips with
  add/remove, fireSnipe loops through all selected dates

fix(tests): resolve 4 CI failures across platforms

1. test_telegram_webhook: mock aiohttp with FakeResponse when not
   installed so web.Response(status=N).status works correctly
2. test_matrix: use return_value on AsyncClient mock so the shared
   _mock_client_instance (with add_event_callback) is returned
3. test_production_readiness: pass script path via sys.argv instead
   of embedding in f-string (Windows \a → \x07 escape bug)
4. graph checkpoint ordering: add monotonic _seq counter as tiebreaker
   when two checkpoints share the same created_at timestamp

Add card editing feature with live set validation (#3)

* Add click-to-edit card correction for misidentified cards

Users can now click any card in the Detected Cards grid to open an edit
dialog and correct misidentified attributes (color, shape, shading, number).
The dialog shows a live preview of the card as attributes are changed.
Saving updates the card and automatically recomputes valid sets.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01PPU5rYdE1J87YTrf6bdeGp

* Add tsconfig.tsbuildinfo to .gitignore

This file is a TypeScript incremental build artifact and should not be tracked.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01PPU5rYdE1J87YTrf6bdeGp

* Remove unused Google Fonts imports from layout

The Geist font variables were declared but never applied (body uses font-sans).
Removing the next/font/google imports allows builds without network access.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01PPU5rYdE1J87YTrf6bdeGp

* Add Playwright tests for card edit feature

- playwright.config.ts: test config using pre-existing Next.js prod server
- tests/card-edit.spec.ts: 10 tests covering the card edit dialog (open,
  cancel, attribute changes, set recomputation) and the demo page
- app/test-results/page.tsx: fixture page rendering SetResults with mock
  cards so tests bypass the file upload + AI analysis flow
- components/set-results.tsx: add data-testid="detected-cards-grid" for
  reliable test selection
- @playwright/test added as dev dependency

All 10 tests pass.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01PPU5rYdE1J87YTrf6bdeGp

* Add Playwright output dirs to .gitignore

test-results/ and playwright-report/ are generated by Playwright test runs
and should not be tracked.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01PPU5rYdE1J87YTrf6bdeGp

* Address Copilot review comments

- Reset hoveredSetIndex on card save to prevent undefined access when validSets shrinks
- Fix Playwright trace setting to retain-on-failure (on-first-retry is useless with retries=0)
- Add keyboard accessibility to clickable card div (role, tabIndex, aria-label, onKeyDown)
- Rename misleading test name to accurately describe that number change breaks the valid set

https://claude.ai/code/session_01PPU5rYdE1J87YTrf6bdeGp

commit.message:
Enhance pre-dispatch checklist with structured format and constraint forwarding (#9)

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Classify WaitInAlwaysCombErrors → §9.2.2.2.2 [skip ci]

§9.2.2.2.2 states that statements in an always_comb shall not include those that block, have blocking timing or event controls, or fork-join statements. The wait statement is a level-sensitive event control (§9.4.3) and is a blocking event control, so its use inside always_comb violates the prohibition stated in §9.2.2.2.2.

commit.message:
Fix stepper auto-navigation: only jump to initialStep when opening

The useEffect that reset currentStep to initialStep fired whenever
completionState changed (because initialStep recalculates on every
completion change). This caused the stepper to auto-jump forward
whenever a module became complete, causing the Next button to skip
a step entirely. Now we only reset on the open transition.

- Secondary: #D4A373 Warm Gold
- Accent: #F4F1ED Soft Cream
- Background: #0C1220 Deep Navy Dark
- Surfaces: #1A2538, #1F2A44
- Borders: #2A3A5C
- Muted text: #7A8BA8 Blue-Gray

Updated tailwind.config.ts brand + surface palettes,
globals.css design tokens, and all inline hex references.
AmEx + Four Seasons energy.

fix: 修复 Google Ads 访问级别检测器的类型错误

问题：
- getGoogleAdsClient 需要凭证对象，但传入了 userId
- listAccessibleCustomers 需要 refresh_token 参数
- response.resource_names 是数组，不是 response.length

修复：

Renamed from "SWEny Self-Triage" to "Continuous Improvement" — this is
the showcase workflow demonstrating SWEny running autonomously on its own
codebase. Runs Mon & Thu on a schedule (dry-run: false by default).

logs as the observability input via the file provider.

commit.message:
fix: batch fixes 2026-03-07 (ROK-691, ROK-716, ROK-698) (#382)

* perf: use background cache refresh to prevent settings decrypt from blocking cron jobs (ROK-698)

Settings cache TTL expiry now triggers a non-blocking background refresh
instead of blocking the calling request/cron job with 3-4s of synchronous
decryption. Cold cache (initial startup) still blocks to ensure settings
are available before the app serves requests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: add regression tests for mobile first-login calendar navigation (ROK-691)

Add tests covering both root causes of the bug where tapping an event
in schedule view after first login would drill down to an empty day view
instead of navigating to the event detail:

1. CalendarView: verify schedule view event tap navigates to /events/:id
   even when Zustand viewPref is stale at 'month' from a prior session
2. use-auth: verify login() invalidates ['events'] query cache so stale
   empty results don't persist after authentication

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: validate voice channel type when updating Discord scheduled event (ROK-716)

When /bind event channel: sets notificationChannelOverride to a text
channel, the scheduled event edit would pass a text channel ID as the
voice channel, which Discord silently rejects. Now tryEdit checks the
guild channel cache to verify the override is voice-based before using
it, falling back to the channel resolver for text channels.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: resolve max-lines lint errors in scheduled-event and settings services

Extract resolveVoiceForEdit to discord-ops helpers, remove re-exports
from settings.service.ts and update consumers to import from types directly.

Implements the CC Member Transparency Index per the persona doc spec,
replacing the 4-pillar Constitutional Fidelity score with a 5-pillar
Transparency Index aligned with the vision:

- Participation (35%): vote rate on governance actions
- Rationale Quality (30%): provision + article coverage + reasoning
- Responsiveness (15%): time-to-vote scoring
- Independence (10%): CC-bloc dissent + DRep alignment independence
- Community Engagement (10%): endorsements + questions (future)

New files:
- lib/scoring/ccTransparency.ts: 5-pillar scoring module
- components/cc/CCTransparencyTrend.tsx: D3 trend chart (epoch history)
- app/api/governance/cc-transparency/route.ts: public API endpoint
- supabase/migrations/052_cc_transparency_index.sql: snapshot table +
  new columns on cc_members

  inter-body alignment (DRep + SPO), peer rank, trend chart
- /discover/committee: renamed to CC Transparency Index leaderboard
  with rank numbers, grade badges, methodology section

PLAT-430: Add comprehensive manual testing checklist

Created 15-section manual QA checklist covering:
1. Installation & Setup (HACS + manual)
2. Configuration Flow (discovery, validation, completion)
3. Entity Functionality (lights, switches, sensors)
4. Device Management (multi-device, device info)
5. Service Calls (turn_on/off with parameters)
6. Error Handling (connection, validation, BLE issues)
7. Performance (response times, resource usage)
8. Accessibility (WCAG 2.1 AA - keyboard, screen reader, visual)
9. Multi-Browser Testing (desktop + mobile)
10. Upgrade & Migration (version compatibility)
11. Security (auth, encryption, logs)
12. Documentation (README, in-app help)
13. Edge Cases (unusual configs, network issues)
14. Regression Testing (critical paths)
15. Release Readiness (sign-off process)

Complements 85% automated test coverage with manual UX and hardware testing.

commit.message:
fix(alloy): remove redundant streetcode Docker discovery sources

streetcode and streetcode-laravel are host Laravel apps — their logs are
already shipped via loki.source.file bind mounts. The duplicate
discovery.docker + loki.source.docker entries opened file descriptors on
Docker log streams that didn't exist, causing the recurring
"copy stream failed: file already closed" errors in dockerd logs.

commit.message:
Fix blank pages on new planning tabs + R navigates home

- API routes now return raw data instead of wrapped objects (e.g.
  res.json(data) not res.json({ items: data })). Components expected
  raw arrays/objects but server was wrapping them, causing TypeError
  crashes on .filter()/.map() calls and blank content areas.
- Affected: wedding-details, allergies, bedrooms, ceremony-order,
  decor, makeup, shuttle, rehearsal-dinner (GET + POST + PUT responses)
- Clicking the Rixey R in the header now navigates back to the home
  view: chat section on client dashboard, wedding list on admin

commit.message:
fix: shallow clone で推論結果の差分検出が失敗する問題を修正

GH-AW のデフォルト fetch-depth: 1 により git diff が親コミットを
参照できず、常に skip: true になっていた。
git diff の代わりに GitHub API (compare) を使用するよう変更。

commit.message:
Wire up dead buttons with toast and fill prefers-reduced-motion

- "Join Us" and "Learn More" event buttons now show a toast message
- Toast component: glass-morphism pill that auto-dismisses after 2.5s
- Fill @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) to disable starfield,
  shooting stars, sparkles, spinning looper, floating orbs, and particles

repository.name: neo-foundation
repository.description: All of the Neo Foundation codebase

commit.message:
Add notes export to Google Drive and Nextcloud as .txt files

Export daily notes and workspace notes as plain text files organized
in folders per space (Snackbar/Daily/, Snackbar/{Space Name}/).
Supports Google Drive (via drive.file scope) and Nextcloud (via WebDAV).
Tracks file IDs for rename handling, validates configs with clear error
messages, disambiguates duplicate space names, and includes a test
connection button for Nextcloud.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Initial commit: AI Content Ops Crew

Fully automated 6-agent CrewAI pipeline that scans the AI landscape,
curates top stories, predicts trends, writes blog articles and video
scripts, and delivers a glassmorphism dark newsletter via Yahoo SMTP.
Includes Discord bot trigger support.
